overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a group of people gathered around a bonfire on a rooftop at night. The futuristic Night City skyline with iconic illuminated skyscrapers rises in the background, creating a moody atmosphere with contrasting warm firelight and cool blue ambient lighting.

sitting on a folding chair near the fire

large circular wind turbine structure on the right side of the frame
metal folding chairs arranged around the fire for seating
red metal barrel or drum near the right side of the fire

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot shows a group of people gathered in a circle around a blazing bonfire on a rooftop at night. The iconic Arasaka towers and wind turbines of Night City rise in the background against a dark blue sky, while the fire casts warm orange light on the surrounding individuals seated on folding chairs. The atmosphere is calm and communal, with the futuristic metropolis providing a dramatic backdrop to the intimate gathering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of an intimate rooftop gathering that contrasts a warm communal fire against the cold scale of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on a group of people seated in folding chairs, gathered in a tight circle around a blazing bonfire. As the warm orange light of the flames illuminates the faces of the individuals, the camera captures the stark juxtaposition of this small sanctuary against the dark blue night sky. The scene then expands visually to reveal the towering Arasaka skyscrapers and rotating wind turbines of Night City rising in the background. Finally, the composition settles into a moody balance between the flickering heat of the fire and the distant, cool glow of the illuminated city skyline.
